summary: 2 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Dune 3
film.announcement: Behind-the-scenes images reveal production underway in Abu Dhabi desert, confirming Chalamet, Zendaya, and Villeneuve's return for the third installment.

film.title: The Lords' Day
film.talent: Damson Idris, Harry Lawtey, Arsema Thomas, Timothy Spall
film.announcement: Netflix series adds Harry Lawtey, Arsema Thomas, Timothy Spall and additional cast members to the project starring Damson Idris.

tv.title: Adarsh Baal Vidyalaya
tv.announcement: Prime Video premiere date set for July with Kay Kay Menon starring.

tv.title: The Pitt
tv.announcement: Shawn Hatosy confirms season 3 is in development and reveals he will direct an episode of the upcoming season.
